author: Omer Bese
summary: BESE two-layer tokenizer (40 base + 248 BPE merges = 288 vocab) shrinks embedding table by ~276KB vs SP1024, funding extra transformer depth. Depth recurrence (3 loops on layers 3-5), parallel residuals, n-gram tilt at eval, compiled NS5 optimizer, batched EMA.
notes: Novel tokenizer submission — non-record track. First custom tokenizer submission to the challenge. Sliding window eval with stride=64 and n-gram prior tilt.
